es.name: Calculadora de Moqueta
es.seo_title: Calculadora de Moqueta – Metros Cuadrados y Lineales
es.seo_description: Mide y presupuesta la instalación de tu moqueta o alfombra. Introduce el tamaño de la habitación y el ancho del rollo para obtener m², yardas y metros lineales, con desperdicio incluido.
es.description: Calculadora 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.

en.name: Carpet Calculator
en.seo_title: Carpet Calculator – Square Metres & Linear Metres
en.seo_description: Measure and budget your carpet installation accurately. Enter room size and roll width to get coverage in square metres, square yards, and linear metres — with cutting waste factored in.
en.description: Calculator 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.

fr.name: Calculatrice de Moquette
fr.seo_title: Calculatrice Moquette – Mètres Carrés et Linéaires
fr.seo_description: Estimez la quantité de moquette à commander pour votre pièce. Entrez les dimensions et la largeur du rouleau pour obtenir les m², yards carrés et mètres linéaires nécessaires, chutes comprises.
fr.description: Calculateur 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.

pt.name: Calculadora de Carpete
pt.seo_title: Calculadora de Carpete – Metros Quadrados e Lineares
pt.seo_description: Calcule o carpete ideal para cada ambiente. Insira as dimensões do quarto e a largura do rolo para ver a área em m², jardas quadradas e metros lineares, já com a margem de desperdício.
pt.description: Calculadora 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.

de.name: Teppichboden-Rechner
de.seo_description: Berechnen Sie Teppichboden, Unterlage und Klebeband für Ihren Bodenbelag.
de.result_context: Room area: {room_area_m2} m² ({square_yards} sq yd), linear metres needed: {linear_meters_needed}
de.formula_display: Room area = Length × Width; Linear metres = ceil(area ÷ roll_width × adjustment_factor)

de.description: Berechnen Sie Teppichboden, Unterlage und Klebeband für Ihren Bodenbelag.

it.name: Calcolatore di Moquette
it.seo_title: Calcolatore Moquette – Metri Quadri e Lineari
it.seo_description: Calcola la moquette perfetta per ogni stanza in pochi passaggi. Inserisci le dimensioni dell'ambiente e la larghezza del rotolo per ottenere m², yard quadrati e metri lineari, scarto incluso.
it.description: Calcolatore 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
